text: Add regression coverage for watchdog panel supervisor header semantics
description: Add focused tests that verify the watchdog panel renders lease placement, supervisor naming, automate/stop wording, state text/color, and absence of obsolete owner/worker header UI. Cover both hydrated runtime state and live socket-driven state updates where practical.

status.comment: Current fixes are covered by a narrow component spec; this should become a stable regression target for future watchdog UI changes.
